sqlMap.select: select id, complianceCode, sendUserNo, noteTitle, noteContent, attacheId, complianceType, sendDepartment,noteMember,noteDepart,noteCompa,noteRemoveMember from imy_complictip where id = #id#
select id, complianceCode, sendUserNo, noteTitle, noteContent, attacheId, complianceType, sendDepartment,noteMember,noteDepart,noteCompa,noteRemoveMember from imy_complictip_cap4 where id = #id#
select id, complianceCode, sendUserNo, noteTitle, noteContent, attacheId, complianceType, sendDepartment,noteMember,noteDepart,noteCompa,noteRemoveMember from imy_complictip_flow where id = #id#
select id, complianceCode, sendUserNo, noteTitle, noteContent, attacheId, complianceType, sendDepartment,noteMember,noteDepart,noteCompa,noteRemoveMember from imy_complictip_flow_cap4 where id = #id#
select id, compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, attachemark, notedepart, notemember, finishedflag from wf_complictip w where w.compliancecode = #code#
select id, compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, attachemark, notedepart, notemember, finishedflag from wf_complictip_cap4 w where w.compliancecode = #code#
select id, compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, attachemark, notedepart, notemember, finishedflag from wf_complictip w where w.compliancecode = #code#
select id, compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, attachemark, notedepart, notemember, finishedflag from wf_complictip_cap4 w where w.compliancecode = #code#

select id, finishedflag, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart, isfinishstudy, contactdepart, attachmark, flowid from wf_compcptrain w where w.traincode = #code#

select id, finishedflag, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart, isfinishstudy, contactdepart, attachmark, flowid from wf_compcptrain_cap4 w where w.traincode = #code#
sqlMap.update: update imy_complictipson i1 set i1.signedmember = (select decode(i1.signedmember, null, w.notemember, i1.signedmember || ',' || w.notemember) from wf_complictip w, imy_complictip i, imy_complictipson s where w.compliancecode = i.compliancecode and i.id = s.formmainid and w.notedepart = s.signdep and i1.signdep = w.notedepart and i.id = i1.formmainid and i.id = #formId#), i1.signmember = (select replace(i1.signmember, w.notemember, '') from wf_complictip w, imy_complictip i, imy_complictipson s where w.compliancecode = i.compliancecode and i.id = s.formmainid and w.notedepart = s.signdep and i1.signdep = w.notedepart and i.id = i1.formmainid and i.id = #formId#) where exists (select 1 from wf_complictip w, imy_complictip i, imy_complictipson s where w.compliancecode = i.compliancecode and i.id = s.formmainid and w.notedepart = s.signdep and i.id = i1.formmainid and i1.signdep = w.notedepart and i.id = #formId#)
